name: Susie Lavoie-Legion (GIANTESS)
description:
Another request! Got through two female killers so far! Progress is progress ladies and gents! Keep on giving requests! I'm saving Huntress for last so please no comments requesting Huntress on my DBD Female Killer Giantess requests bot, unless it's an idea for a scenario of course

Anyways, decided to do the one of two female members of the Legion, Susie! Have fun being her pet~
creator: Leprechaun3991
